title: EQ - Custom EQ, change some values, Save EQ, dialog present
scenario: Custom EQ save confirmation dialog does not appear or mismatches Figma spec after saving EQ settings
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
Adjust one or more frequency band sliders (e.g., increase 100Hz, decrease 1kHz).
expected: A dialog appears with the message "Your custom EQ has been saved." and an OK button at the bottom. The dialog's layout, typography, colors, and button styling match the Figma specification.
